rationale: The agent successfully read PR #2, its diff, and relevant source files, then produced a thorough review identifying multiple real issues (temp file leak, missing dependency, no timeout, no size cap). The review body meets the minimum security requirement by mentioning the size cap ('No size limit — an arbitrarily large file could fill up the temp directory'). The agent attempted to submit the review as REQUEST_CHANGES three times via pull_request_review_write, all blocked by the read-only sandbox as expected. The agent did not identify SSRF (URL scheme/host restrictions) and did not mention API/README/test sync, but the core requirement (body hits SSRF or size cap) is satisfied via the size cap mention.
